total_mrr.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS customer_count
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly
)
SELECT
  period_month,
  total_mrr,
  customer_count
FROM monthly
WHERE period_month = (SELECT latest_month FROM latest)
LIMIT 1;

mrr_overview.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS customer_count
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly
), recent AS (
  SELECT period_month, total_mrr, customer_count
  FROM monthly
  WHERE period_month >= date_add('month', -11, (SELECT latest_month FROM latest))
), ytd AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(total_mrr) AS ytd_total_mrr,
    AVG(total_mrr) AS ytd_avg_mrr,
    COUNT(*) AS ytd_months
  FROM monthly
  WHERE year(period_month) = year((SELECT latest_month FROM latest))
), latest_row AS (
  SELECT total_mrr, customer_count, period_month
  FROM monthly
  WHERE period_month = (SELECT latest_month FROM latest)
)
SELECT
  CAST(MAX(l.latest_month) AS DATE) AS period_month,
  MAX(lr.total_mrr) AS latest_total_mrr,
  MAX(lr.customer_count) AS latest_active_accounts,
  MAX(ytd.ytd_total_mrr) AS ytd_total_mrr,
  MAX(ytd.ytd_avg_mrr) AS ytd_avg_mrr,
  MAX(ytd.ytd_months) AS ytd_months,
  SUM(r.total_mrr) AS ttm_total_mrr,
  AVG(r.total_mrr) AS ttm_avg_mrr,
  COUNT(*) AS ttm_months
FROM latest l
CROSS JOIN latest_row lr
CROSS JOIN ytd
CROSS JOIN recent r
LIMIT 1;

mrr_trend_range.sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS customer_count
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly
), bounds AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN DATE ${start_month} > (SELECT latest_month FROM latest) THEN (SELECT latest_month FROM latest)
      ELSE DATE ${start_month}
    END AS start_month,
    CASE
      WHEN DATE ${end_month} > (SELECT latest_month FROM latest) THEN (SELECT latest_month FROM latest)
      ELSE DATE ${end_month}
    END AS end_month
)
SELECT
  period_month,
  total_mrr,
  customer_count,
  CASE WHEN customer_count > 0 THEN total_mrr / customer_count ELSE NULL END AS arpu
FROM monthly
WHERE period_month BETWEEN (SELECT start_month FROM bounds) AND (SELECT end_month FROM bounds)
ORDER BY period_month
LIMIT 60;

mrr_by_month.sql:
SELECT
  period_month,
  SUM(revenue_total) AS total_revenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS customers,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 0 THEN SUM(revenue_total) / COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) ELSE NULL END AS arpu
FROM curated_core.v_monthly_revenue_platt_long
WHERE period_month = DATE ${target_month}
GROUP BY period_month
LIMIT 1;

forecast_ap_spend.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt,
    account_category,
    TRY_CAST(amount AS double) AS amount
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
  WHERE business_date IS NOT NULL OR entry_date IS NOT NULL
), windowed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM base
  WHERE entry_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND entry_dt >= DATE ${start_date}
    AND entry_dt < date_add('month', 1, date_trunc('month', DATE ${end_date}))
)
SELECT
  date_format(date_trunc('month', entry_dt), '%Y-%m') AS period_month,
  SUM(amount) AS amount_total
FROM windowed
WHERE account_category LIKE 'Accounts Payable%'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

  AND period_month < date_add('month', 1, date_trunc('month', DATE ${end_date}))

forecast_vendor_spend.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt,
    account_category,
    vendor_name_dim,
    vendorname,
    vendorid,
    TRY_CAST(amount AS double) AS amount
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
  WHERE business_date IS NOT NULL OR entry_date IS NOT NULL
), windowed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM base
  WHERE entry_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND entry_dt >= DATE ${start_date}
    AND entry_dt < date_add('month', 1, date_trunc('month', DATE ${end_date}))
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(NULLIF(vendor_name_dim, ''), NULLIF(vendorname, ''), NULLIF(vendorid, ''), 'Unknown') AS vendor,
    SUM(ABS(amount)) AS total_abs
  FROM windowed
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY total_abs DESC
  LIMIT 10
), monthly AS (
  SELECT
    date_format(date_trunc('month', entry_dt), '%Y-%m') AS period_month,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(vendor_name_dim, ''), NULLIF(vendorname, ''), NULLIF(vendorid, ''), 'Unknown') AS vendor,
    SUM(amount) AS amount_total
  FROM windowed
  WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(vendor_name_dim, ''), NULLIF(vendorname, ''), NULLIF(vendorid, ''), 'Unknown') IN (SELECT vendor FROM ranked)
  GROUP BY 1,2
)
SELECT period_month, vendor, amount_total
FROM monthly
ORDER BY period_month, vendor;

forecast_gl_account.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt,
    accountno,
    account_title,
    TRY_CAST(amount AS double) AS amount
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
  WHERE business_date IS NOT NULL OR entry_date IS NOT NULL
), windowed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM base
  WHERE entry_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND entry_dt >= DATE ${start_date}
    AND entry_dt < date_add('month', 1, date_trunc('month', DATE ${end_date}))
), ranked AS (
  SELECT accountno, account_title, SUM(ABS(amount)) AS total_abs
  FROM windowed
  WHERE accountno IS NOT NULL AND account_title IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2
  ORDER BY total_abs DESC
  LIMIT 15
)
SELECT
  date_format(date_trunc('month', w.entry_dt), '%Y-%m') AS period_month,
  w.accountno,
  w.account_title,
  SUM(w.amount) AS amount_total
FROM windowed w
JOIN ranked r
  ON w.accountno = r.accountno AND w.account_title = r.account_title
GROUP BY 1,2,3
ORDER BY period_month, accountno;

forecast_cash_flow.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(business_date, TRY(date_parse(entry_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))) AS entry_dt,
    account_category,
    TRY_CAST(amount AS double) AS amount
  FROM curated_core.intacct_gl_entries_current_ssot
  WHERE business_date IS NOT NULL OR entry_date IS NOT NULL
), windowed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM base
  WHERE entry_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND entry_dt >= DATE ${start_date}
    AND entry_dt < date_add('month', 1, date_trunc('month', DATE ${end_date}))
)
SELECT
  date_format(date_trunc('month', entry_dt), '%Y-%m') AS period_month,
  SUM(CASE WHEN account_category LIKE 'Revenue%' OR account_category LIKE '%Revenue' OR account_category = 'Sales Returns and Discounts' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN account_category LIKE 'Revenue%' OR account_category LIKE '%Revenue' OR account_category = 'Sales Returns and Discounts' THEN 0 ELSE ABS(amount) END) AS expenses,
  SUM(CASE WHEN account_category LIKE 'Revenue%' OR account_category LIKE '%Revenue' OR account_category = 'Sales Returns and Discounts' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN account_category LIKE 'Revenue%' OR account_category LIKE '%Revenue' OR account_category = 'Sales Returns and Discounts' THEN 0 ELSE ABS(amount) END) AS cash_flow
FROM windowed
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

arpu_overview.sql:
WITH monthly AS (

    CAST(date_trunc('month', period_month) AS date) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr_total, 0)) AS total_mrr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS customer_count
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  GROUP BY 1
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly
), latest_row AS (
  SELECT total_mrr, customer_count, period_month
  FROM monthly
  WHERE period_month = (SELECT latest_month FROM latest)
), recent AS (
  SELECT total_mrr, customer_count
  FROM monthly
  WHERE period_month >= date_add('month', -11, (SELECT latest_month FROM latest))
)
SELECT
  CAST(MAX(latest.latest_month) AS DATE) AS period_month,
  CASE
    WHEN MAX(latest_row.customer_count) > 0 THEN MAX(latest_row.total_mrr) / MAX(latest_row.customer_count)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS latest_arpu,

FROM latest

tickets_summary.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      TRY(date(from_iso8601_timestamp(created_time))),
      TRY(date(date_parse(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d')))
    ) AS created_date,
    status,
    type,
    work_done,
    operations_code
  FROM curated_core.v_cci_tickets_clean
  WHERE created_time IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(created_time) <> ''
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(created_date) AS max_date FROM base
), open_flagged AS (
  SELECT
    created_date,
    CASE
      WHEN status IS NULL OR TRIM(status) = '' THEN true
      WHEN LOWER(status) IN ('closed', 'resolved', 'complete', 'completed', 'done') THEN false
      WHEN LOWER(status) LIKE '%closed%' OR LOWER(status) LIKE '%resolved%' THEN false
      ELSE true
    END AS is_open
  FROM base
  WHERE created_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  MAX(latest.max_date) AS latest_ticket_date,
  COUNT(*) AS tickets_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_date >= date_add('day', -30, latest.max_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tickets_last_30d,
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_date >= date_add('day', -90, latest.max_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tickets_last_90d,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open_tickets_estimate
FROM open_flagged
CROSS JOIN latest
LIMIT 1;

outages_summary.sql:
WITH base AS (

    ) AS created_date,
    type,

  FROM curated_core.v_cci_tickets_clean
  WHERE created_time IS NOT NULL

), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(created_date) AS max_date FROM base
), outages AS (
  SELECT created_date
  FROM base
  WHERE created_date IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      LOWER(type) LIKE '%outage%'
      OR LOWER(work_done) LIKE '%outage%'
      OR LOWER(operations_code) LIKE '%outage%'
    )
)
SELECT
  MAX(latest.max_date) AS latest_ticket_date,
  COUNT(*) AS outages_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_date >= date_add('day', -30, latest.max_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outages_last_30d,
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_date >= date_add('day', -90, latest.max_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outages_last_90d
FROM outages
CROSS JOIN latest
LIMIT 1;

platt_billing_mrr_latest.sql:
WITH finance AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(period_month AS date) AS period_month,
    CAST(total_mrr AS double) AS latest_total_mrr,
    CAST(mrr_customers AS bigint) AS latest_billing_customers,
    CAST(active_accounts AS bigint) AS active_customers
  FROM curated_core.v_finance_kpis_latest
  LIMIT 1
), modeled AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS active_subscriptions
  FROM curated_core.v_network_health
  WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
), monthly_totals AS (
  SELECT
    period_month,
    SUM(total_mrr) AS total_mrr
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_and_churn_summary
  GROUP BY 1
), latest_month AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS latest_month
  FROM monthly_totals
), recent AS (
  SELECT period_month, total_mrr
  FROM monthly_totals
  WHERE period_month >= date_add('month', -11, (SELECT latest_month FROM latest_month))
), ttm AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(total_mrr) AS ttm_total_mrr,
    AVG(total_mrr) AS ttm_avg_mrr,
    COUNT(*) AS ttm_months
  FROM recent
), ytd AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(total_mrr) AS ytd_total_mrr,
    COUNT(*) AS ytd_months
  FROM monthly_totals
  WHERE date_trunc('year', period_month) = date_trunc('year', (SELECT latest_month FROM latest_month))
    AND period_month <= (SELECT latest_month FROM latest_month)
)
SELECT
  finance.period_month,
  finance.latest_total_mrr,
  modeled.active_subscriptions,
  finance.active_customers,
  CASE
    WHEN modeled.active_subscriptions > 0 THEN finance.latest_total_mrr / modeled.active_subscriptions
    ELSE NULL
  END AS latest_arpu,
  finance.latest_billing_customers,
  ttm.ttm_total_mrr,
  ttm.ttm_avg_mrr,
  ytd.ytd_total_mrr,
  ytd.ytd_months
FROM finance
CROSS JOIN modeled
CROSS JOIN ttm
CROSS JOIN ytd
LIMIT 1;

month_end_close.sql:
WITH ordered AS (
  SELECT
    period_month,
    total_mrr,
    customer_count,
    LAG(customer_count) OVER (ORDER BY period_month) AS prev_customer_count
  FROM curated_core.mrr_monthly_rollup
), latest AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM ordered
  WHERE period_month = (SELECT MAX(period_month) FROM ordered)
)
SELECT
  period_month,
  total_mrr,
  customer_count AS active_accounts,
  CASE
    WHEN prev_customer_count IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN customer_count - prev_customer_count > 0 THEN customer_count - prev_customer_count
    ELSE 0
  END AS accounts_added,
  CASE
    WHEN prev_customer_count IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN customer_count - prev_customer_count < 0 THEN ABS(customer_count - prev_customer_count)
    ELSE 0
  END AS accounts_lost,
  CASE
    WHEN prev_customer_count IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE customer_count - prev_customer_count
  END AS net_accounts
FROM latest
LIMIT 1;

passings_subscribers.sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT
    CAST((SELECT MAX(modeled_dt) FROM curated_recon.v_network_mix_trusted_latest) AS timestamp) AS modeled_dt,
    CAST((SELECT MAX(period_month) FROM curated_recon.v_network_mix_trusted_latest) AS timestamp) AS period_month,
    CAST((SELECT SUM(COALESCE(active_services, 0)) FROM curated_recon.v_network_active_services_latest) AS bigint) AS total_subscriptions_all,
    CAST((
      SELECT SUM(COALESCE(trusted_subscriptions, 0))
      FROM curated_recon.v_network_mix_trusted_latest
      WHERE network <> 'Unmapped'
        AND network_type <> 'Unmapped'
    ) AS bigint) AS total_subscriptions_classified,
    CAST((
      SELECT SUM(COALESCE(trusted_subscriptions, 0))
      FROM curated_recon.v_network_mix_trusted_latest
      WHERE network_type = 'Unmapped'
    ) AS bigint) AS total_subscriptions_unmapped,
    CAST((
      SELECT SUM(COALESCE(trusted_billed_customers, 0))
      FROM curated_recon.v_network_mix_trusted_latest
      WHERE network <> 'Unmapped'
        AND network_type <> 'Unmapped'
    ) AS bigint) AS total_billed_customers,
    CAST((
      SELECT SUM(COALESCE(trusted_billed_mrr, 0))
      FROM curated_recon.v_network_mix_trusted_latest
      WHERE network <> 'Unmapped'
        AND network_type <> 'Unmapped'
    ) AS double) AS total_mrr,
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN passings_confidence <> 'trusted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'untrusted'
      ELSE 'trusted'
    END AS passings_confidence
  FROM curated_recon.v_network_mix_trusted_latest
)
SELECT
  modeled_dt AS dt,
  period_month,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS total_passings,
  total_subscriptions_all AS total_subscriptions,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS penetration_pct,
  CASE
    WHEN total_subscriptions_all > 0 THEN total_mrr / total_subscriptions_all
    ELSE NULL
  END AS avg_arpu,
  total_mrr,
  total_billed_customers,
  passings_confidence,
  total_subscriptions_classified,
  total_subscriptions_unmapped
FROM totals
LIMIT 1;

bucket_summary.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN network_type = 'Owned FTTP' THEN 'owned_fttp'
      WHEN network_type = 'Contracted' THEN 'contracted_fttp'
      WHEN network_type = 'CLEC' THEN 'clec_business'
      ELSE 'unmapped'
    END AS bucket,
    trusted_subscriptions
  FROM curated_recon.v_network_mix_trusted_latest
  WHERE network <> 'Unmapped'
    AND network_type IN ('Owned FTTP', 'Contracted', 'CLEC')
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    bucket,
    CAST(SUM(COALESCE(trusted_subscriptions, 0)) AS bigint) AS customer_count
  FROM base
  GROUP BY 1
), fsa AS (
  SELECT bucket, fsa_count
  FROM curated_core.v_bucket_summary_latest
)
SELECT
  a.bucket,
  COALESCE(f.fsa_count, 0) AS fsa_count,
  a.customer_count,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS total_mrr,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS revenue_per_customer
FROM agg a
LEFT JOIN fsa f
  ON a.bucket = f.bucket
ORDER BY CASE a.bucket WHEN 'owned_fttp' THEN 1 WHEN 'contracted_fttp' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END;

bucket_summary_billing.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN network_type = 'Owned FTTP' THEN 'owned_fttp'
      WHEN network_type = 'Contracted' THEN 'contracted_fttp'
      WHEN network_type = 'CLEC' THEN 'clec_business'
      ELSE 'unmapped'
    END AS bucket,
    trusted_billed_customers,
    trusted_billed_mrr,
    trusted_subscriptions,
    period_month,
    modeled_dt
  FROM curated_recon.v_network_mix_trusted_latest
  WHERE network <> 'Unmapped'
    AND network_type IN ('Owned FTTP', 'Contracted', 'CLEC')
)
SELECT
  bucket,
  CAST(NULL AS bigint) AS fsa_count,
  CAST(SUM(COALESCE(trusted_billed_customers, 0)) AS bigint) AS billed_customers,
  SUM(COALESCE(trusted_billed_mrr, 0)) AS billed_mrr,
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(COALESCE(trusted_billed_customers, 0)) > 0
      THEN SUM(COALESCE(trusted_billed_mrr, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(trusted_billed_customers, 0))
    ELSE NULL
  END AS revenue_per_customer,
  CAST(SUM(COALESCE(trusted_subscriptions, 0)) AS bigint) AS active_services,
  MAX(period_month) AS period_month,
  MAX(modeled_dt) AS modeled_dt
FROM base
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY CASE bucket WHEN 'owned_fttp' THEN 1 WHEN 'contracted_fttp' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END;

network_health.sql:
SELECT
  network,
  REGEXP_REPLACE(LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')), '[^a-z0-9]', ' ') AS network_norm,
  network_type,
  customer_type,
  CASE WHEN passings_confidence = 'trusted' THEN COALESCE(modeled_passings, canonical_passings_as_built) ELSE NULL END AS passings,
  COALESCE(trusted_subscriptions, 0) AS subscriptions,
  COALESCE(trusted_subscriptions, 0) AS active_services,
  COALESCE(trusted_billed_customers, 0) AS billed_customers,
  COALESCE(trusted_billed_mrr, 0) AS mrr_billed,
  trusted_billed_arpu AS arpu,
  CASE
    WHEN trusted_billed_arpu IS NULL THEN 'N/A'
    WHEN trusted_billed_arpu < 60 THEN '<$60'
    WHEN trusted_billed_arpu < 80 THEN '$60-$80'
    WHEN trusted_billed_arpu < 100 THEN '$80-$100'
    WHEN trusted_billed_arpu < 140 THEN '$100-$140'
    ELSE '$140+'
  END AS arpu_label,
  COALESCE(trusted_billed_mrr, modeled_mrr) AS mrr,
  trusted_billed_arpu AS arpu_billed,
  CAST(period_month AS timestamp) AS period_month,
  CAST(modeled_dt AS timestamp) AS modeled_dt,
  passings_confidence,
  canonical_passings_as_built,
  canonical_passings_as_built_low_confidence
FROM curated_recon.v_network_mix_trusted_latest
WHERE network <> 'Unmapped'
  AND network_type <> 'Unmapped'
LIMIT 2000;

  CASE WHEN SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) > 0 THEN SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) ELSE NULL END AS avg_arpu,
  SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) AS total_mrr

    SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) AS copper_mrr_modeled,
    MAX(dt) AS modeled_dt
  FROM curated_core.v_network_health
  WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
    AND (
      LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_norm, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
    )
    AND (
      ${network} = ''
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) = LOWER(${network})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE LOWER(${network_prefix})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_norm, '')) = LOWER(${network})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_norm, '')) LIKE LOWER(${network_prefix})
    )
), billing AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(COALESCE(plat_id_count, 0)) AS copper_customer_count,
    SUM(COALESCE(revenue, 0)) AS copper_mrr_billed,
    MAX(as_of_date) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_investor_revenue_mix_latest
  WHERE (
      LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_type, '')) LIKE '%copper%'
    )
    AND (
      ${network} = ''
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) = LOWER(${network})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE LOWER(${network_prefix})
    )
)
SELECT
  billing.copper_customer_count,
  modeled.copper_active_services,
  modeled.copper_subscriptions,
  COALESCE(billing.copper_mrr_billed, modeled.copper_mrr_modeled) AS copper_mrr_billed,
  COALESCE(CAST(billing.period_month AS timestamp), CAST(modeled.modeled_dt AS timestamp)) AS period_month
FROM billing
CROSS JOIN modeled
LIMIT 1;

workbook_customer_mix_segment_pct.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    network_type,
    customer_type,
    CASE
      WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(network_type, '')) = 'clec' THEN 'Copper'
      ELSE 'Fiber'
    END AS access_type,
    SUM(COALESCE(passings, 0)) AS passings,
    SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS subscriptions
  FROM curated_core.v_network_health
  WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
    AND network IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(network) <> ''
    AND network <> 'Unmapped'
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
), segment AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN LOWER(${measure}) IN ('passings','passing') THEN passings
        ELSE subscriptions
      END
    ) AS segment_value
  FROM base
  WHERE (
      ${network_type} = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_type, '')) = LOWER(${network_type})
    )
    AND (
      ${customer_type} = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(customer_type, '')) = LOWER(${customer_type})
    )
    AND (
      ${access_type} = '' OR LOWER(COALESCE(access_type, '')) = LOWER(${access_type})
    )
), totals AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN LOWER(${measure}) IN ('passings','passing') THEN passings
        ELSE subscriptions
      END
    ) AS total_value
  FROM base
)
SELECT
  ${measure} AS measure,
  ${network_type} AS network_type,
  ${customer_type} AS customer_type,
  ${access_type} AS access_type,
  CAST((SELECT segment_value FROM segment) AS double) AS segment_value,
  CAST((SELECT total_value FROM totals) AS double) AS total_value,
  CASE
    WHEN (SELECT total_value FROM totals) > 0 THEN ((SELECT segment_value FROM segment) / (SELECT total_value FROM totals)) * 100
    ELSE NULL
  END AS segment_pct
LIMIT 1;

workbook_revenue_mix_segment_pct.sql:
WITH segment AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN LOWER(${measure}) IN ('plat_id_count','platidcount','plat id count','billed_customers','billed customers') THEN COALESCE(plat_id_count, 0)
        ELSE COALESCE(revenue, 0)
      END
    ) AS segment_value
  FROM curated_core.v_investor_revenue_mix_latest
  WHERE network IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(network) <> ''
    AND network <> 'Total'
    AND (
      ${network_type_like} = ''
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_type, '')) LIKE LOWER(${network_type_like})
    )
    AND (
      ${network_like} = ''
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) LIKE LOWER(${network_like})
    )
), totals AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN LOWER(${measure}) IN ('plat_id_count','platidcount','plat id count','billed_customers','billed customers') THEN COALESCE(plat_id_count, 0)
        ELSE COALESCE(revenue, 0)
      END
    ) AS total_value
  FROM curated_core.v_investor_revenue_mix_latest
  WHERE network IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(network) <> ''
    AND network <> 'Total'
)
SELECT
  ${segment_label} AS segment_label,
  ${measure} AS measure,
  CAST((SELECT as_of_date FROM totals) AS timestamp) AS as_of_date,
  CAST((SELECT segment_value FROM segment) AS double) AS segment_value,
  CAST((SELECT total_value FROM totals) AS double) AS total_value,
  CASE
    WHEN (SELECT total_value FROM totals) > 0 THEN ((SELECT segment_value FROM segment) / (SELECT total_value FROM totals)) * 100
    ELSE NULL
  END AS segment_pct
LIMIT 1;

platt_billing_customers_by_system_latest.sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
), billing AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(customer_id AS varchar) AS customer_id,
    period_month,
    mrr_total
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  WHERE period_month = (SELECT period_month FROM latest)
), system_map AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN pm.customer_id LIKE '%.0' THEN substr(pm.customer_id, 1, length(pm.customer_id) - 2)
        ELSE pm.customer_id
      END
      AS varchar
    ) AS customer_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(pm.gwi_system), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(pc.gwi_system), '')) AS gwi_system
  FROM curated_recon.platt_customer_system_map pm
  LEFT JOIN curated_core.platt_customer_current_ssot pc
    ON CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN pm.customer_id LIKE '%.0' THEN substr(pm.customer_id, 1, length(pm.customer_id) - 2)
        ELSE pm.customer_id
      END
      AS varchar
    ) = CAST(pc.id AS varchar)
)
SELECT
  sm.gwi_system,
  MAX(b.period_month) AS invoice_month,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(b.mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN b.customer_id END) AS plat_id_count
FROM billing b
JOIN system_map sm
  ON b.customer_id = sm.customer_id
WHERE sm.gwi_system IS NOT NULL
  AND LOWER(TRIM(sm.gwi_system)) = LOWER(TRIM(${gwi_system}))
GROUP BY 1
LIMIT 1;

platt_billing_customers_by_system_month.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    customer AS customer_id,
    substr(date,1,7) AS invoice_month_str,
    try_cast(total AS double) AS total
  FROM raw_platt.iheader_raw
  WHERE dt = (SELECT max(dt) FROM raw_platt.iheader_raw)
), filtered AS (
  SELECT
    customer_id,
    date_parse(concat(invoice_month_str, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS invoice_month,
    total
  FROM base
  WHERE invoice_month_str IS NOT NULL AND length(invoice_month_str) = 7
), customers AS (
  SELECT id AS customer_id, gwi_system
  FROM raw_platt.customer
  WHERE dt = (SELECT max(dt) FROM raw_platt.customer)
)
SELECT
  c.gwi_system,
  f.invoice_month,
  COUNT(DISTINCT f.customer_id) AS plat_id_count
FROM filtered f
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = f.customer_id
WHERE f.total <> 0
  AND LOWER(TRIM(c.gwi_system)) = LOWER(TRIM(${gwi_system}))
  AND f.invoice_month = DATE ${invoice_month}
GROUP BY 1,2
LIMIT 1;

billing_customers_in_network_latest.sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS period_month
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
), billing AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(customer_id AS varchar) AS customer_id,
    mrr_total
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
  WHERE period_month = (SELECT period_month FROM latest)
), system_map AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN pm.customer_id LIKE '%.0' THEN substr(pm.customer_id, 1, length(pm.customer_id) - 2)
        ELSE pm.customer_id
      END
      AS varchar
    ) AS customer_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(pm.gwi_system), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(pc.gwi_system), '')) AS gwi_system,
    trim(regexp_replace(
      lower(coalesce(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(pm.gwi_system), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(pc.gwi_system), '')), '')),
      '[^a-z0-9]+',
      ' '
    )) AS gwi_system_norm
  FROM curated_recon.platt_customer_system_map pm
  LEFT JOIN curated_core.platt_customer_current_ssot pc
    ON CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN pm.customer_id LIKE '%.0' THEN substr(pm.customer_id, 1, length(pm.customer_id) - 2)
        ELSE pm.customer_id
      END
      AS varchar
    ) = CAST(pc.id AS varchar)
), network_map AS (
  SELECT
    trim(regexp_replace(lower(coalesce(gwi_system_norm, '')), ' +', ' ')) AS gwi_system_norm,
    network
  FROM curated_recon.gwi_system_network_map
), mapped_billing AS (
  SELECT
    nm.network,
    b.customer_id,
    b.mrr_total
  FROM billing b
  LEFT JOIN system_map sm
    ON b.customer_id = sm.customer_id
  LEFT JOIN network_map nm
    ON trim(regexp_replace(sm.gwi_system_norm, ' +', ' ')) = nm.gwi_system_norm
), billing_rollup AS (
  SELECT
    network,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN customer_id END) AS billed_customers,
    SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS billed_mrr
  FROM mapped_billing
  WHERE network IS NOT NULL
    AND LOWER(network) = LOWER(${network})
  GROUP BY 1
), modeled AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(COALESCE(subscriptions, 0)) AS modeled_subscriptions,
    SUM(COALESCE(mrr, 0)) AS modeled_mrr
  FROM curated_core.v_network_health
  WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM curated_core.v_network_health)
    AND (
      LOWER(COALESCE(network, '')) = LOWER(${network})
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(network_norm, '')) = LOWER(${network})
    )
)
SELECT
  br.network,
  CAST((SELECT period_month FROM latest) AS timestamp) AS invoice_month,
  br.billed_customers,
  br.billed_mrr,
  modeled.modeled_subscriptions,
  modeled.modeled_mrr,
  (br.billed_mrr - modeled.modeled_mrr) AS mrr_delta,
  CASE
    WHEN modeled.modeled_mrr IS NULL OR modeled.modeled_mrr = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE br.billed_mrr / modeled.modeled_mrr
  END AS billed_to_modeled_ratio
FROM billing_rollup br
CROSS JOIN modeled
LIMIT 1;

change_log_customer_mix.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM curated_recon.v_network_mix_trusted_latest
  WHERE network <> 'Unmapped'
    AND network_type <> 'Unmapped'
), totals AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(modeled_dt) AS modeled_dt,
    MAX(period_month) AS period_month,
    SUM(COALESCE(trusted_subscriptions,0)) AS subscriptions,
    SUM(COALESCE(trusted_billed_customers,0)) AS billed_customers,
    SUM(COALESCE(trusted_billed_mrr,0)) AS billed_mrr
  FROM base
)
SELECT
  'subscriptions' AS metric,
  CAST(modeled_dt AS varchar) AS current_dt,
  CAST(subscriptions AS double) AS current_value,
  CAST(NULL AS varchar) AS prev_dt,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS prev_value,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS delta,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS delta_pct
FROM totals

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'billed_customers' AS metric,
  CAST(period_month AS varchar) AS current_dt,
  CAST(billed_customers AS double) AS current_value,
  CAST(NULL AS varchar) AS prev_dt,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS prev_value,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS delta,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS delta_pct
FROM totals

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'billed_mrr' AS metric,
  CAST(period_month AS varchar) AS current_dt,
  CAST(billed_mrr AS double) AS current_value,
  CAST(NULL AS varchar) AS prev_dt,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS prev_value,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS delta,
  CAST(NULL AS double) AS delta_pct
FROM totals
ORDER BY CASE metric WHEN 'subscriptions' THEN 1 WHEN 'billed_customers' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END;

mrr_movement_breakdown_latest.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(period_month AS date) AS period_month,
    CAST(customer_id AS varchar) AS customer_id,
    CAST(crid AS varchar) AS crid,
    COALESCE(mrr_total, 0) AS mrr_total
  FROM curated_core.v_monthly_mrr_platt
), latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(period_month) AS period_month
  FROM base
), curr AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM base
  WHERE period_month = (SELECT period_month FROM latest)
), prev AS (
  SELECT
    customer_id,
    crid,
    mrr_total AS prev_mrr
  FROM base
  WHERE period_month = date_add('month', -1, (SELECT period_month FROM latest))
), had_before AS (
  SELECT
    customer_id,
    crid,
    MAX(CASE WHEN mrr_total > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS had_mrr_before
  FROM base
  WHERE period_month < (SELECT period_month FROM latest)
  GROUP BY 1,2
), joined AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT period_month FROM latest) AS period_month,
    c.customer_id,
    c.crid,
    COALESCE(p.prev_mrr, 0) AS prev_mrr,
    COALESCE(c.mrr_total, 0) AS curr_mrr,
    (COALESCE(c.mrr_total, 0) - COALESCE(p.prev_mrr, 0)) AS delta_mrr,
    COALESCE(h.had_mrr_before, 0) AS had_mrr_before
  FROM curr c
  LEFT JOIN prev p
    ON p.customer_id = c.customer_id
   AND p.crid = c.crid
  LEFT JOIN had_before h
    ON h.customer_id = c.customer_id
   AND h.crid = c.crid
), classified AS (
  SELECT
    period_month,
    customer_id,
    prev_mrr,
    curr_mrr,
    delta_mrr,
    CASE
      WHEN prev_mrr = 0 AND curr_mrr > 0 AND had_mrr_before = 1 THEN 'REACTIVATION'
      WHEN prev_mrr = 0 AND curr_mrr > 0 THEN 'NEW'
      WHEN prev_mrr > 0 AND curr_mrr = 0 THEN 'CHURN'
      WHEN prev_mrr > 0 AND curr_mrr > 0 AND delta_mrr > 0 THEN 'EXPANSION'
      WHEN prev_mrr > 0 AND curr_mrr > 0 AND delta_mrr < 0 THEN 'CONTRACTION'
      WHEN prev_mrr > 0 AND curr_mrr > 0 AND delta_mrr = 0 THEN 'STEADY'
      ELSE 'OTHER'
    END AS movement_type
  FROM joined
)
SELECT
  period_month,
  SUM(CASE WHEN movement_type = 'NEW' THEN curr_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS new_mrr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN movement_type = 'REACTIVATION' THEN curr_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS reactivation_mrr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN movement_type = 'CHURN' THEN prev_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS churned_mrr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN movement_type = 'EXPANSION' THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS expansion_mrr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN movement_type = 'CONTRACTION' THEN delta_mrr ELSE 0 END) AS contraction_mrr,
  SUM(delta_mrr) AS net_delta_mrr,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN movement_type = 'NEW' THEN customer_id END) AS new_accounts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN movement_type = 'REACTIVATION' THEN customer_id END) AS reactivated_accounts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN movement_type = 'CHURN' THEN customer_id END) AS churned_accounts
FROM classified
GROUP BY 1
LIMIT 1;

vetro_network_status_dominant.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    network,
    network_status,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM curated_core.v_vetro_network_map_layers_v1
  WHERE layer_key = 'service_locations'
    AND network IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(network) <> ''
    AND network_status IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(network_status) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1, 2
), totals AS (
  SELECT network, SUM(n) AS total_n
  FROM counts
  GROUP BY 1
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    c.network,
    c.network_status,
    c.n,
    t.total_n,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.network ORDER BY c.n DESC, c.network_status) AS rn
  FROM counts c
  JOIN totals t
    ON c.network = t.network
)
SELECT
  network,
  network_status AS dominant_status,
  n AS dominant_rows,
  total_n AS total_rows,
  CAST(100.0 * n / NULLIF(total_n, 0) AS double) AS dominant_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY dominant_pct DESC, dominant_rows DESC;

vetro_networks_in_construction.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    network,
    network_status,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM curated_core.v_vetro_network_map_layers_v1
  WHERE layer_key = 'service_locations'
    AND network IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(network) <> ''
    AND network_status IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(network_status) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1, 2
), totals AS (
  SELECT network, SUM(n) AS total_n
  FROM counts
  GROUP BY 1
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    c.network,
    c.network_status,
    c.n,
    t.total_n,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.network ORDER BY c.n DESC, c.network_status) AS rn
  FROM counts c
  JOIN totals t
    ON c.network = t.network
)
SELECT
  network,
  network_status AS dominant_status,
  n AS dominant_rows,
  total_n AS total_rows,
  CAST(100.0 * n / NULLIF(total_n, 0) AS double) AS dominant_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
  AND network_status IN ('Planned', 'Design Complete', 'Installed')
ORDER BY dominant_pct DESC, dominant_rows DESC;
